entries.summary: Launch data seed: federal Cheaper Home Batteries Program rates (STC factor 6.8 from 1 May 2026), state scheme summaries for WA/NSW/VIC/QLD/SA, FiT ranges, and reference system costs.
Federal program moved from flat STC factor to three-tier structure (100% / 60% / 15%). STC factor set at 6.8.
Federal STC factor stepped down to 8.4 (flat rate, pre-tier era).
Cheaper Home Batteries Program commenced with flat STC factor 9.3.
Noted: SolarQuotes acquired by Origin Energy (relevant to independence comparison pages).
